name: btf2go validation — no runs in 7 days
message:
## btf2go validation: Framework has not run in 7 days

**What triggered:** No `btf2go.validation.findings.*` metrics have been emitted in the past 7 days. The validation framework may have stopped running.

**Likely causes:**
- The Proxmox VM template or Daytona snapshot is unavailable
- The `DATADOG_API_KEY` environment variable is missing from the runner
- The validation runner cronjob or CI trigger has been disabled

**Dashboard:** https://us3.datadoghq.com/dashboard/2n5-36z-3rc/btf2go-validation

**Remediation:** Check that `validation/proxmox/validate.sh` can reach the Proxmox host (`srv`) and that `.env` has `DATADOG_API_KEY` set. Re-run manually: `cd validation/proxmox && ./validate.sh`.

@degenchuckchuck@gmail.com
